TextView.android:text: Turn your tablet into a second display
Open Side Screen on your Mac → switch to the Wireless tab → scan the QR shown
Scan a fresh QR from your Mac to re-pair.
Camera permission required to scan QR
You blocked the permission. Open Settings → Apps → Side Screen → Permissions to allow.
Route: scan a Mac QR code
Keys: captured 0 / unsupported 0 · assist 0 · dup 0 · last none
No-root mode captures Activity keyboard events and pointer capture. Android system keys may stay local.
Optional keyboard assist can catch a few extra key events. It does not read screen content, and root is still off.
